clips.title: Phoenix Blaze Head Glitch
clips.description: This is a blaze head glitch that I found on Ascent that makes for some easy kills while holding heaven. A lot of people dont see this one coming!

clips.description: this is for when you are defending B site

clips.title: A site moli from A lobby

clips.description: With first window it will full flash or part flash people entering B main, second window will flash if they already made it into B main

clips.description: out of bath right kamping spot kill

clips.title: Recon Dart from A to C - Haven
clips.description: Line roof top side displayed into the middle of bounce indicators. Look up to where I do and shoot with max distance.
clips.author: Turndo

clips.title: Recon Dart - A to Mid - Haven
clips.description: Line up top marker displayed with arrow with dark corner of box. Use 2 bounces. Fire at max distance. Good to use at start of round to spot Mid push.
clips.author: Turndo

clips.title: B Main Boost
clips.description: Quick and easy boost to get a sneaky angle on those holding B. Works for retakes as well.
clips.author: yamyyack

clips.title: Back of Hookah Clear
clips.description: Quick and easy way to get people out of the back of hookah, very lenient in how to throw, try getting a feel for it instead of trying to set it up.
clips.author: yamyyack

clips.title: Raze | Ascent | Defending B Site
clips.description: Enjoy!

clips.title: Raze | Defending A Site Grenade |
clips.description: take out enemies pushing A-Main

clips.title: A Bath Hot Hands Push
clips.description: Use this angle to flush out bath door campers.

clips.title: A Main to Rafters
clips.description: Use this push to get the "jump" on your opponents early in the round.
